data.title: Sects in the City (by Shelby Shaw)

description.markdown:
Quotes, references, and images from Shelby Shaw’s piece [“Sects in the City”] (https://www.are.na/editorial/sects-in-the-city) on Are.na Editorial. This is a partial transcript of [episode two] (https://radio.montezpress.com/#/show/3470) of our show with Montez Press Radio.

https://www.are.na/editorial/sects-in-the-city
